exam.title: HSC Higher Mathematics 1st Paper - Hyper Mega Hot Exclusive Model Tests (10 Sets)
exam.note: Each set contains 25 MCQs. Each question has 4 options (ক, খ, গ, ঘ), correct answer, short explanation (1–2 lines), topic tag and probability tag.

questions.question: যদি \(\vec a=(1,2,3)\), \(\vec b=(2,-1,1)\), তাহলে \(\vec a\cdot\vec b\) কত?
P(A)=0.3, P(B)=0.5 এবং A,B স্বাধীন হলে P(A∩B) কত?
ডিফারেনশিয়াল সমীকরণ dy/dx = 3y এর সাধারণ সমাধান কি?
A 2×2 invertible হলে AX=0 সমাধান X কী?
নিচের ডেরিভেটিভগুলো: i) d/dx(sin x)=cos x; ii) d/dx(cos x)=-sin x; iii) d/dx(tan x)=sec^2 x. কোনটি সঠিক?
det(AB)=detA·detB এবং det(A^T)=detA; কোনগুলো সঠিক?
questions.explanation: i ও ii সঠিক; iii (detA=0 → invertible) ভুল।

questions.question: x=2cos t, y=2sin t এই প্যারামেট্রিক বক্ররেখা কোনটি?
নিচের কোনটি সঠিক নয়? i) d/dx(x^n)=n x^{n-1}; ii) ∫ x^n dx = x^{n+1}/(n+1) (n≠−1); iii) d/dx(ln x)=1/x. কোনটি ভুল?
y=ln(sin x) হলে dy/dx কত (0<x<π)?
questions.explanation: d/dx ln(sin x) = cos x / sin x = cot x.

questions.question: নিচের কোনগুলো সঠিক? i) ∫_0^π sin x dx = 2; ii) ∫_0^π cos x dx = 0; iii) ∫_0^π tan x dx সংজ্ঞায়িত নয়। কোনটি সঠিক?
questions.explanation: i ও ii সঠিক; tan x তে π/2 এ অসীমতা → iii সঠিক; তাই সবগুলো সঠিক।

questions.question: যদি \(f(x)=x^2\sin x\), তাহলে \(f'(0)\) কত?
questions.explanation: f'(x)=2x sin x + x^2 cos x; f'(0)=0.

questions.question: ∫ x e^{x} dx এর অনির্দিষ্ট ইন্টিগ্রাল কি?
A = [[2,1],[0,3]] হলে A^{-1} কি?
questions.explanation: Inverse of upper triangular: diag inverses and off-diagonal -a_{12}/(a_{11}a_{22}).

questions.question: sin^2 x + cos^2 x সমান কি?
Probability: একটি ন্যায্য কয়েন 3 বার উল্টালে 2 মাথা আসার সম্ভাবনা কত?
If sequence a_n = 2n, sum of first 5 terms = ?
If det A = 5, det(2A) for 2×2 matrix A is?
Sum of infinite geometric series with a=3, r=1/3 is?
Parametric x=t^2, y=t^3 curve at t=1 slope dy/dx = ?
If P(A)=0.6 and P(B|A)=0.5, then P(A∩B) = ?
Which is not true? i) d/dx(x^n)=n x^{n-1}; ii) ∫ x^{-1} dx = ln|x| + C; iii) d/dx(e^{ax}) = a e^{ax}.
questions.explanation: All three statements are correct (with standard conditions).

questions.question: d/dx (sec x) = ?
questions.explanation: Derivative of sec x is sec x tan x.

questions.question: Which integrals are improper? i) ∫_0^1 1/x dx; ii) ∫_1^∞ 1/x^2 dx; iii) ∫_0^π tan x dx. Which true?
questions.explanation: i diverges at 0, iii has singularity at π/2; ii converges.

questions.question: Matrix [[0,1],[-1,0]] corresponds to which transformation in R^2?
If |z|=1 and z≠1, argument of (1+z)/(1−z) is ?
d/dx (x^x) = ?
questions.explanation: Use ln differentiation: derivative = x^x(ln x +1).

questions.question: Probability: draw 2 cards from 52 without replacement, both aces probability?
Solve differential dy/dx = x, y(0)=1 → y = ?
questions.explanation: Integrate x → x^2/2 + C; use y(0)=1 → C=1.

questions.question: If trace of [[a,b],[c,d]] = 5 and det = 6, characteristic equation is λ^2 -5λ +6 =0; roots are?
Sum of first n odd numbers equals?
If det A = 0 then A is?
Parametric x=cos t, y=sin t; dx/dt at t=π/2 is ?
If P(A)=0.2, P(B)=0.3 and mutually exclusive, P(A∪B) = ?
Which is false? i) d/dx(e^{ax}) = a e^{ax}; ii) ∫ e^{ax} dx = e^{ax}/a + C; iii) e^{x+y} = e^x + e^y.
Vector projection of a onto b formula involves?
Sum of geometric series with a=2, r=3 (finite n=3) = ?
questions.explanation: Finite sum = a(1-r^n)/(1-r) = 2(1-27)/(1-3)=26; matches direct sum.

questions.question: d/dx (ln|x|) = ?
questions.explanation: Derivative of ln|x| is 1/x for x≠0.

questions.question: Which integrals converge? i) ∫_1^∞ 1/x dx; ii) ∫_1^∞ 1/x^2 dx; iii) ∫_0^1 1/√x dx. Which true?
∫ sec^2 x dx = ?
questions.explanation: Standard integral of sec^2 x is tan x.

questions.question: If z = re^{iθ}, then z̄ = ?
questions.explanation: Complex conjugate of re^{iθ} is re^{-iθ}.

questions.question: If A is 2×2 with trace 4 and det 3, eigenvalues are?
d/dx (x ln x) = ?
questions.explanation: Product rule: 1·ln x + x·(1/x) = ln x +1.

questions.question: Probability: one die rolled twice, probability sum=7?
Solve dy/dx = 2x, y(0)=0 → y = ?
questions.explanation: Integrate 2x → x^2; constant 0 from initial condition.

questions.question: Sum of first n even numbers equals?
If det(A)=2 and A is 3×3, det(3A) = ?
Infinite geometric with a=1, r=1/2 sum = ?
Parametric x=t, y=t^2 slope at t=2 is ?
∫_2^3 (1/x) dx = ?
questions.explanation: ln x from 2 to 3 = ln3 - ln2 = ln(3/2).

questions.question: Which is false? i) ∫ e^{x} dx = e^{x}+C; ii) d/dx(sin x)=cos x; iii) ∫ 1/x dx = ln|x| + C. Which false?
Which improper integral diverges? i) ∫_1^∞ 1/x dx; ii) ∫_1^∞ 1/x^p dx with p>1; iii) ∫_0^1 1/x dx. Which diverge?
questions.explanation: 1/x diverges at ∞ and at 0; p>1 converges.

questions.question: ∫ sin x cos x dx = ?
questions.explanation: Use substitution u=sin x → integral = 1/2 sin^2 x + C.

questions.question: If A=[[2,0],[0,2]], A^{-1} = ?
questions.explanation: Inverse of scalar matrix is scalar inverse.

questions.question: d/dx (ln(1+x^2)) = ?
questions.explanation: Chain rule: derivative of ln(u) is u'/u.

questions.question: Probability: choose 1 card from 52, probability of heart = ?
If tr(A)=0 and A is 2×2 with eigenvalues λ1,λ2 then λ1+λ2 = ?
Sum of first n natural numbers = ?
Parametric x=2t, y=3t^2 slope at t=1 = ?
If P(A)=0.25, P(B)=0.4 and independent, P(A∪B) = ?
Which is true? i) d/dx(sin x)=cos x; ii) ∫ cos x dx = sin x + C; iii) d/dx(ln x)=1/x. Which true?
questions.explanation: All three standard results are true.

questions.question: Sum of geometric finite a(1-r^n)/(1-r) with a=3,r=2,n=3 gives?
d/dx (cot x) = ?
questions.explanation: Derivative of cot x is -csc^2 x.

questions.question: Which improper integral converges? i) ∫_1^∞ 1/x dx; ii) ∫_1^∞ 1/x^{1.5} dx; iii) ∫_0^1 1/x dx. Which converge?
questions.explanation: p>1 converges (ii); i and iii diverge.

questions.question: If f(x)=sin x / x (x≠0) and f(0)=1, f'(0) = ?
questions.explanation: Use limit definition; derivative at 0 is 0.

questions.question: ∫_0^{π/4} sec^2 x dx = ?
questions.explanation: Integral of sec^2 is tan; tan π/4 =1.

questions.question: If A=[[0,1],[-1,0]], A^4 = ?
questions.explanation: This rotation matrix to 90°; A^4 = identity.

questions.question: d/dx (x^x) at x=1 equals?
questions.explanation: Derivative x^x(ln x +1); at x=1 gives 1·(0+1)=1.

questions.question: Probability: two independent events with P(A)=0.2, P(B)=0.3, P(neither) = ?
If tr(A)=6 and det(A)=8 for 2×2, characteristic eqn λ^2 -6λ +8=0 roots are?
Sum of first n cubes equals?
Infinite geometric with a=6, r=1/3 sum = ?
Parametric x=cos t, y=cos 2t slope at t=0 = ?
Which is true? i) d/dx(ln x)=1/x; ii) ∫ 1/x dx = ln|x| + C; iii) ln(ab)=ln a + ln b. Which true?
questions.explanation: All three are standard log properties.

questions.question: Sum 1+4+9+...+n^2 formula is?
questions.explanation: Standard formula for sum of squares.

questions.question: d/dx (ln(sin x)) = ?
questions.explanation: Derivative = cos x / sin x = cot x.

questions.question: Which improper integral converges? i) ∫_1^∞ 1/x dx; ii) ∫_1^∞ 1/x^{2} dx; iii) ∫_0^1 1/x^{0.5} dx. Which converge?
∫_0^{π/2} sin^2 x dx = ?
questions.explanation: Average value 1/2 over interval length π/2 → π/4.

questions.question: If A has eigenvalues 2 and 5, det A = ?
d/dx (x^2 ln x) = ?
questions.explanation: Product rule: 2x ln x + x^2·(1/x)=2x ln x + x.

questions.question: Probability: choose 2 from 3 boys and 2 girls randomly, probability both girls?
If tr(A)=7 and det(A)=10 for 2×2, characteristic eqn λ^2 -7λ +10=0 roots are?
Sum of first n odd numbers = ?
Parametric x=t^3, y=t^2 slope at t=1 = ?
Which is true? i) ∫ cos x dx = sin x + C; ii) d/dx(ln x)=1/x; iii) ∫ sec x tan x dx = sec x + C. Which true?
Which improper integral diverges? i) ∫_0^1 1/x^{0.9} dx; ii) ∫_1^∞ 1/x^{0.9} dx; iii) ∫_0^1 1/x^{0.5} dx. Which diverge?
questions.explanation: For p=0.9, ∫_1^∞ 1/x^p diverges; i and iii converge on (0,1).

questions.question: If A is orthogonal, A^T A = ?
Probability: two fair coins tossed, probability exactly one head?
Solve dy/dx = sin x, y(0)=0 → y = ?
questions.explanation: Integrate sin x → -cos x + C; C=1 to satisfy y(0)=0.

questions.question: If A=[[a,0],[0,a]] scalar matrix, eigenvalues are?
Sum of first n even numbers = ?
Geometric series a=9, r=1/3 infinite sum = ?
Parametric x=sin t, y=cos t slope at t=π/4 = ?
questions.explanation: dy/dx = (-sin t)/(cos t) = -tan t; at π/4 = -1.

questions.question: Which is true? i) ∫ sec x dx = ln|sec x + tan x| + C; ii) d/dx tan x = sec^2 x; iii) ∫ csc x dx = ln|csc x - cot x| + C. Which true?
questions.explanation: All three are standard integral/derivative identities.

questions.question: Which improper integral diverges? i) ∫_1^∞ 1/x dx; ii) ∫_1^∞ 1/x^{1.1} dx; iii) ∫_0^1 1/x^{0.9} dx. Which diverge?
questions.explanation: i diverges (p=1), ii converges (p>1), iii converges.

questions.question: ∫ x cos x dx = ?

options.ক: cos x + x sin x + C
options.খ: x sin x - cos x + C

questions.explanation: Integration by parts gives x sin x - cos x + C.

questions.question: If z = 3(cos 60° + i sin 60°), z in a+bi form is?
sin^3 x identity can be written as?
If A is diagonal with entries 2,3,4 det = ?
Probability: from 3 red and 2 blue balls pick one, probability red = ?
Solve dy/dx = cos x, y(0)=2 → y = ?
questions.explanation: Integrate cos x → sin x + C; C=2.

questions.question: If tr(A)=0 and det(A)= -1 for 2×2, eigenvalues satisfy λ^2 +1=0 → λ = ?
Sum of first n natural numbers squared? (1+2+...+n)^2 equals?
Geometric series a=12, r=1/4 infinite sum = ?
Parametric x=t+1, y=t^2 slope at t=0 = ?
If P(A)=0.7 and P(B)=0.6 and independent, P(A∩B) = ?
Which is false? i) ∫ sin x dx = -cos x + C; ii) d/dx cos x = -sin x; iii) ∫ cos x dx = sin x + C. Which false?
Sum 1+3+5+...+(2n-1) = ?
questions.explanation: Sum of first n odd numbers = n^2.

questions.question: Which improper integral converges? i) ∫_1^∞ 1/x dx; ii) ∫_1^∞ 1/x^{2} dx; iii) ∫_0^1 1/x^{0.8} dx. Which converge?
∫ cos x / (1+sin^2 x) dx substitution u=sin x gives?
questions.explanation: Use u=sin x, integral becomes ∫ du/(1+u^2) scaled → arctan form with √2 factor.

questions.question: If A is invertible, rank(A) = ?
questions.explanation: Invertible matrix has full rank n.

questions.question: Probability: roll a die, probability of even number = ?
Solve dy/dx = 1/(1+x^2), y(0)=0 → y = ?
questions.explanation: Integral of 1/(1+x^2) is arctan x; constant 0.

questions.question: d/dx (x^2 e^{x}) = ?
questions.explanation: Product rule: derivative = 2x e^{x} + x^2 e^{x} = e^{x}(x^2+2x).

questions.question: If det A = -2 for 2×2, det(kA) with k=-3 equals?
Geometric series a=5, r=2 diverges? True or False?
Parametric x= e^t, y= e^{-t} slope at t=0 = ?
Which is true? i) ∫ 1/(x^2+1) dx = arctan x + C; ii) d/dx(arcsin x)=1/√(1-x^2); iii) ∫ sec^2 x dx = tan x + C. Which true?
Sum 1^3+2^3+...+n^3 = ?
questions.explanation: Standard formula: square of sum of first n naturals.

questions.question: d/dx (ln|sec x + tan x|) = ?
questions.explanation: Derivative of ln(sec x + tan x) = sec x.

questions.question: Which improper integral converges? i) ∫_1^∞ 1/x dx; ii) ∫_1^∞ 1/x^{1.5} dx; iii) ∫_0^1 1/x^{0.2} dx. Which converge?
